turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, main apna outstanding balance check karna chahta hoon. Maine jo surgery ki last month, uska poora bill clear nahi hua tha.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ji zaroor. Aapka naam aur patient ID bata sakte hain?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ek second... haan, dekha. Umesh Pawar ji, aapka outstanding balance hai 12,400 rupaye. Yeh laparoscopic procedure ke baad ka balance hai.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, wahi. Toh kya main installment mein de sakta hoon?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hum iske liye billing department se baat kar sakte hain. Usually 2-3 installments allow hoti hain approval ke baad. Main aapka request note kar leta hoon aur billing team aapse kal tak contact karegi.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Theek hai. Mera number update hai na files mein?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, 9822345601 registered hai. Kal call aayegi. Koi aur kaam?
